label: Léa — Complete beginner, couch-to-5K
goal: Be able to run 5K without stopping
athlete_profile: Age: 24, Sex: Female, Height: 168 cm, Weight: 67 kg. Complete beginner, has never followed any training. Walks regularly but has never run more than a few minutes. Motivated but worried about doing it wrong. No health metrics history yet beyond resting HR ~72 bpm.
default_user_message: I want to start running but I get out of breath after two minutes and I don't know where to begin. Is it normal? What should my first weeks look like?
